advancement.endplus.root.title: Into the Dark
advancement.endplus.root.description: Enter the End dimension and face its dangers.
Defeat the Ender Dragon and claim the heart of the void.
Defeat the Ender Dragon in under 10 minutes.
advancement.endplus.dragon.phase_breaker: Destroy the Void Shield twice in a single dragon fight.
advancement.endplus.dragon.void_sovereig: Defeat the Void Leviathan and end what the Aetherans began.
advancement.endplus.mobs.void_stalker_sl: Kill a Void Stalker before it disappears into the stone.
advancement.endplus.mobs.prism_crawler_s: Shatter a Prism Crawler along with its precious shards.
advancement.endplus.mobs.shade_lurker_sl: Drag a Shade Lurker out of the darkness and destroy it.
advancement.endplus.mobs.cliff_wraith_sl: Bring a Cliff Wraith crashing down from the peaks.
advancement.endplus.mobs.ancient_golem_s: Topple an Ancient End Golem, guardian of a lost civilization.
advancement.endplus.mobs.parasite_surviv: Survive with three Ender Parasites latched on simultaneously.
advancement.endplus.mobs.bestiary_comple: Kill at least one of every new mob in the End.
advancement.endplus.exploration.void_was: Set foot in the cracked, lightless Void Wastes.
advancement.endplus.exploration.crystall: Walk among the towering crystal spires of the Crystalline Fields.
advancement.endplus.exploration.umbral_f: Enter the bioluminescent depths of the Umbral Forest.
advancement.endplus.exploration.skyreach: Scale the towering spires of the Skyreach Peaks.
advancement.endplus.exploration.sunken_c: Discover the ruins of the Sunken Citadel Region.
advancement.endplus.exploration.biome_wa: Explore all six of the new End biomes.
advancement.endplus.items.dragon_heart_o: Hold the Dragon Heart — still warm from the fight.
advancement.endplus.items.first_scales.d: Collect your first Void Scales from the dragon's hide.
Mine Endrite Ore from the depths of the outer islands.
advancement.endplus.items.void_miner.des: Extract Void Dust from the raw ore of the End.
advancement.endplus.lore.archivist.title: Archivist
advancement.endplus.lore.archivist.descr: Collect all eight Lore Tablets and uncover the truth of the Aetherans.
